text: Lost parcel twice and ridiculous procedure for giving me my money back.

The absolute worst. This company is to be avoided at all costs. Customer service useless patronising and threatening. God help you if you need a refund. That will never happen. Parcels go missing a lot. As they use Evri. They deserve each other.

Ordered a mammut jacket and it arrived in good time, but then returned the item as size didnt fit and they still havnt refunded me for the item. I got an email saying my item is not eligable for a refund. I disputed this and have had no response. AVOID AVOID AVOID SCAMMERS!!!!!!

Was initially apprehensive about ordering from here due the number of poor reviews. However, the price of item was most reasonable from here, so gave it a shot and I'm pleased to say, it went well. The only thing i would say is, I think the item should have come inside its branded box, but it came without any box - it did still have the label on though and was in perfect condition, so I was fine with that.

I ordered a pair of Adidas Spezials that were out of stock everywhere but Zalando managed to get a limited amount of stock in. I placed my order, it was dispatched the next day and delivered the following day. All on free standard delivery. I cannot complain at all because the service was quicker than other websites and I received exactly what I ordered.

Ordered two pairs of trainers at the same time only one pair shown up but was to small so I sent them back. A week had passed by with no show of the second pair of trainers so I emailed them asking for a update they told me to wait until a certain date due to delivery issues and to email them after that date if no show, which I did do but the shoes still didn't turn up so I emailed them then they wanted me to wait another 2 days so I then done that but yet no trainers was delivered I then emailed again but they stopped responding to every email I sent I had to open up a claim with PayPal to get my £80 back.
No complaints from me. Ordered an Adidas sweater that was much cheaper than any other website. Fast dispatch and received exactly what I ordered and I would definitely use them again.
If I could give zero I would. Item was not sent. At this point I believe this is actually a scam company and I won't recieve anything. Look at the other reviews

I returned my order as the item was incorrect. I contacted Zalando live chat about this as I was very upset and was told to return it. Once I returned it, my return was rejected. I was once again sent back the wrong item and now I am being refused of a refund! I have been fighting this for 3 months now and will not give up even if it means I have to file a lawsuit against Zalando. My money has been stolen and I have been treated disgustingly as a customer. Not to mention that every time I reach out to customer service, they are extremely rude and leave the chat!

First they messed up delivery of a Christmas present for my daughter and now not only dispatched a week after order was placed, two days later the status says 'returning to sender'. Disgusting, incompetent and untrustworthy. Don't bother ordering from these scammers.

I was a bit paranoid about using Zalando based on the poor reviews, but they were the cheapest place I could find a particular pair of Converse I wanted! Honestly, I had no issues: the item was about £10 cheaper than elsewhere, shipping was free, and it was dispatched on Monday with EVRI and arrived the next day.

Purchased a pair of converse boots, they came with a faulty zip so cannot be worn. Filled in the form and recieved a partial refund of £11. As the boots cannot be worn this is unacceptable. There is no way to contact them and their chat bot is useless.
I wanted to post as I saw so many negative reviews after placing an order and it worried me but I had zero issues. Order arrived quickly and was exactly as described. Really pleased with my purchase!

Was really worried about ordering when I saw all the negative reviews however it was the only seller I could find with the bag my daughter wanted in stock, thankfully my experience was really positive and the bag arrived on time and well packaged. Would certainty consider ordering again from them in the future.
Ordered on the Sunday, delivered by Tuesday with EVRI. No issues at all, and very good prices for designer menswear.

Ordered 8 items totalling £450, received just one item. Zalando tell me that the full order was shipped and will not refund me and close live chats and end phone calls. I have photo evidence of the package delivered and the weight on the label is 4.445kg but package only weighs 800g. The size of the package is impossible to fit 8 items of clothing in. Had to open a dispute with PayPal to get a refund.

Zalando are sitting with £170 worth of vouchers ie my money. I have placed a couple of ordered from Zalando. One was a bag advertised much smaller than it was, so I returned it. I have twice ordered Birkenstock sandals that Evri the delivery company have lost, apparently, so I'll be refunded again. I can't seem to spend these vouchers. I have asked for them to be converted to cash. Avoid this company!!

Zalando should not be partnering with a courier like Evri, whose service has proven to be unreliable. On multiple occasions, parcels were marked as 'delivery attempted' even when they were destined for a collection point. No genuine delivery attempt appeared to be made, and instead of retrying, the parcel was simply returned to the sender. Choosing a courier purely to reduce costs may seem efficient in the short term, but in the long run it risks damaging customer trust and loyalty.

Good products and prices! Kept well informed of deliveries and my returns were seamless. They give discount codes that you can actually use on sales items as well, so I would definitely recommend! Update: I am taking back 2 stars as they are giving me a code then saying its not valid for my order.. poor show, now feel really let down.
Avoid Avoid Avoid - Awful customer service, rude and unreasonable. Calls go unanswered, a silent tone plays until you hang up, and redialing is frustrating.

Plataforma de compra de ropa de primeras marcas con muy buenos precios todo el año y con ofertas puntuales espectaculares. Pagos con todas las posibilidades, incluido contrarreembolso. Envíos puntuales, perfectamente embalados y sin problemas para recoger en infinidad de puntos de recogida. Devoluciones gratuitas durante 30 o 60 días, sin ningún problema y reembolsos más o menos rápidos. Asistencia al cliente rápida y eficaz por Chat, mail.
note: Spanish — Translation: Shopping platform for top brands with very good prices year-round, including spectacular flash sales. All payment methods available. Punctual shipments, perfectly packaged, easy collection-point pickup. Free returns for 30–60 days, quick refunds. Fast and efficient customer service via chat and email.

text: El servicio de reparto con SEUR es pésimo, si lo pones a tu dirección particular la mayoría de las veces dicen que no te encontrabas y si lo pones a un punto de recogida se escudan con que la dirección no es clara, cuando trabaja siempre con este punto de recogida. Hasta ahora todo lo que he comprado ha estado bien, de calidad e igual que las fotos.
note: Spanish — Translation: The delivery service with SEUR is terrible — home delivery attempts mostly marked as failed; collection-point deliveries excused as unclear address. However, every item purchased has been good quality and matched the photos.

text: Una basura de empresa, cancelación de compra al momento del pedido, dinero bloqueado durante semana y media, cancelación de pedido por incompetencia (envían tallas que no son, productos por duplicado etc..) dinero congelado un mes... dejan mucho que desear.... no perdáis vuestro tiempo!!! la atención al cliente es una broma, incompetencia total!
note: Spanish — Translation: A rubbish company — order cancelled at placement, money blocked for 10 days, orders cancelled due to incompetence (wrong sizes, duplicate items). Money frozen for a month. Customer service is a joke, total incompetence. Don't waste your time.

text: Zalando use Evri so clearly parcel didn't arrive. Evri did try and deliver but next delivery they said they couldn't access the address which has never been the case and a common issue with EVRi and only EVRi. When enquiring about where the parcel is, I was asked to fill out a form, an un editable PDF, so the expectation is to print it out, and scan back in after completing. This is an archaic wasteful process. This is not a company I would go near again.

I sent both together in the original packaging using their returns QR code so i suggested they talk to their courier as clearly these items have been stolen. Apparently i don't get any refund at all and they take no responsibility for the loss of them!! Never will I buy from them again and I'm now nearly £300 down! Disgusting!!

I ordered a coach tail bag and after ordering it I looked and reviews and was very worried that I was scammed. I ordered the bag on Monday and it was estimated to arrive on Friday (which it did). At first communication was a little off where the evri tracking did not work but I am so glad that I did not listen to the bad reviews as I have now gotten my limited edition coach bag in perfect condition.

My parcel was dumped outside my property by Evri without permission, without a safe-place request, and without any attempt to deliver it correctly. Naturally, it was taken. I escalated this to Evri, who carried out an investigation and confirmed in writing that the delivery was non-compliant and should never have been left outside. They have admitted fault clearly and directly. And yet, Zalando continue to hide behind the same script: 'Your parcel was delivered.' Zalando's refusal to act is unacceptable, dismissive, and shows a shocking lack of accountability. After years as a customer, I'm genuinely stunned at how little they care when something goes wrong.

Never received my shoes. They used Evri as a courrier and Evri did acknowledge receipt of the parcel 4 days after order, however it never left Evri's distribution centre. I emailed Zalando 13 days after order asking them to chase Evri as it was clearly lost / stolen. No response 3 weeks after order. When I then contacted them again they just fobbed me off and closed the chat, after refusing to cancel the order. Still not received either my goods or a refund.

This company is absolutely amazing fair prices and fast postage with tracking from start to finish this company is so trustworthy I've had really good experience can't believe all the negativity will definitely buy from this company again I've downloaded the app

The customer support is appalling, and basically the staff are robots. No complaints addressed. I was fobbed off with a lost parcel until Evri admitted my christmas present was lost/stolen by staff. I finally got a refund, but utterly awful experience and won't buy from them again. They say they can't send new boots so my Christmas present was wasted time on my behalf.
